creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Basic tests on my Sandy Bridge system shows no issues with the combination of mesa and xf86-videoo-intel updates while running without drm-kmod. Kernel module is i915kms. That is as close to drm-legacy-kmd as I can get in 11.2-STABLE. glxgears runs at about 5500 FPS.

I will move to running the updated mesa and video-intel driver with drm-stable-kmod 

I should mention that I had to delete graphics/mesa-dri/files/patch-llvm7 to get the mesa ports to build. I suspect this is not a real issue.
